name: Tessarion
title: The Blue Queen
gameplay_role: Offensive support Champion who empowers fire-focused allies while punishing physical-oriented enemies.
official_gameplay_summary: Applies steady pressure through both Fire and Physical attacks.
Weakens key threats by reducing their Damage Dealt.
Helps preserve allied momentum with protection against incoming Physical Damage.
Performs best in compositions built around strong Fire Damage dealers.
Support effects scale more reliably when her team maintains high troop thresholds.
recommended_play_pattern: Maintain early stability so Tessarion can amplify the army.
Pair with strong damage dealers whose Commands and Habits deal meaningful Fire damage.
Time and coordinate pressure so her buffs and debuffs are active during important damage windows.

command.name: Cobalt Flame
effects: On rounds 1, 4, and 7, deal Fire Damage to 1 enemy in any lane, prioritizing enemies that deal Physical Damage excluding Basic Attacks.
The rounds 1, 4, and 7 Fire Damage has a chance to reduce the target's Damage Dealt for 2 rounds. This Damage Dealt reduction is doubled if the target deals Physical Damage excluding Basic Attacks.
On rounds 3, 6, and 9, deal Physical Damage to 1 enemy in the same lane.

displayed_values.fire_damage_targeting: Enemy in any lane; prioritizes enemies that deal Physical Damage excluding Basic Attacks
displayed_values.damage_dealt_reduction_doubled_against: Targets that deal Physical Damage excluding Basic Attacks

definitions.fire_damage_scaling: Official preview did not provide numeric scaling values.
definitions.physical_damage_scaling: Official preview did not provide numeric scaling values.
definitions.damage_dealt_reduction: Reduces the target's outgoing Damage Dealt. Official preview did not provide percentage values.

habits.name: Sharpened Beauty
habits.effect: Each round, increase Tessarion's Physical Damage Dealt and Fire Damage Dealt until the end of the round. Double this effect if Tessarion is above 75% Troop Capacity or has Advantage.

habits.name: Blazing Leader
habits.effect: At the start of combat, increase Fire Damage Dealt of 1 ally in any lane until the end of combat, prioritizing the left flank.

habits.name: Molten Armor
habits.effect: At the start of odd-numbered rounds, has a chance to increase Tessarion's Fire Damage Dealt and reduce the Physical Damage Received of 2 other allies. If Tessarion is afflicted with Panic, also reduce Tessarion's Physical Damage Received. Each effect lasts for 2 rounds.

habits.name: Clever Maneuver
habits.effect: At the start of combat, increase the Intelligence and Initiative, enhanced by Instinct, of the ally with the highest Intelligence.

habits.name: The Blue Queen
habits.effect: At the start of each round, has a chance to reduce the Damage Received and increase the Intelligence, enhanced by Intelligence, of 1 other ally that deals Fire Damage for 2 rounds. Double the Damage Received reduction and Intelligence increase if Tessarion is above 75% Troop Capacity.

fixed_values.targeting: Other ally that deals Fire Damage

synergy_notes: Tessarion should be evaluated with Fire-focused allies first.
The left flank is important because Blazing Leader prioritizes the left flank for Fire Damage Dealt.
She wants teams that stay above 75% Troop Capacity because Sharpened Beauty and The Blue Queen double under high-troop conditions.
Her kit overlaps with Army 1-style goals by combining damage reduction, allied protection, and support scaling, but official preview does not confirm her troop affinities or numeric values.
open_questions: Exact troop affinities are not published in the official preview.
Exact subclass, stats, troop capacity, power, and relic requirements are not published in the official preview.
Exact command damage rates, debuff percentages, habit unlock stars, and habit level tables are not published in the official preview.
